## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

What should be added or changed?

## Alternatives

What simpler alternatives should be considered?

## MVP Boundary Check

Does this require new product scope, permissions, accounts, payments, streaming, or another provider?

## Notes

Any additional context?
